name: Ideogram API
what_it_does: Ideogram REST API — AI image generation with industry-leading text rendering capabilities, enabling agents to generate images with accurate legible typography, logos, signs, and text overlays that other models typically fail to render correctly.
use_cases: Agents generating marketing banners and social media graphics with readable text headlines and taglines
Logo and brand asset creation — agents generating initial logo concepts with text elements for design iteration
Sign and label generation — agents creating product label mockups, event signage, and infographic text elements
Book cover and poster design — agents generating cover art with accurate title and author text rendering
Content thumbnail creation — agents generating YouTube thumbnails and article headers with readable text overlays
not_for: Complex photorealistic images without text — Midjourney or Stable Diffusion produce better photorealism for text-free images
High-volume batch generation — API is usage-based; for massive scale, self-hosted Stable Diffusion is more cost-effective
Video generation — Ideogram is image-only; use Runway or Pika for AI video generation
best_when: You need to generate images that include readable text, typography, logos, or signs — Ideogram's text rendering is significantly more accurate than competing image generation models.
avoid_when: You don't need text in images and want the most photorealistic output — Midjourney or DALL-E 3 produce better pure-image quality for non-text content.

auth.notes: API key from Ideogram account settings. Passed as Api-Key header. Account-level access with no scope granularity. Keys are revocable from account settings.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 10 images/day via web app; API requires paid plan or credits
pricing.paid_tiers: Basic: $7/month (400 credits); Plus: $16/month (1000 credits); Pro: $48/month (3200 credits); ~$0.02-0.08/image
pricing.notes: Credit-based pricing. Credits consumed per generation based on model and resolution. Priority queue access on paid plans. No per-image API pricing — credits bundle pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Concurrent requests limited by plan; rate limits apply per API key; no published req/min limit

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Clean REST API with OpenAPI documentation. Synchronous response — no polling needed. Error responses include descriptive messages. Safety filter errors are explicit. Simple and predictable API structure.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Image generation is non-deterministic — same prompt produces different images each call. Seed parameter can increase reproducibility but does not guarantee identical outputs. No idempotency keys.
known_agent_gotchas: Generation is synchronous unlike Stability AI — no polling needed but timeout handling is important for large images
Text accuracy degrades for very long text strings — break long copy into multiple smaller generation requests
Safety filters may reject prompts inconsistently — implement retry with rephrased prompt on content rejection
Credit balance must be checked before bulk generation — API does not return warning before credits run out
Image URLs expire — download and store generated images immediately; do not rely on Ideogram CDN URLs long-term

security_score_components.security_notes: GDPR compliant. TLS enforced. API key with no scope granularity. US data processing. No SOC2 documented. Newer company — verify compliance requirements for enterprise deployments.
